statement: The system shall record farmer identity plot and household profile data
acceptance_criteria: Farmer record created with mandatory fields and unique ID

statement: The system shall capture and store field/plot boundaries as spatial features
acceptance_criteria: Polygon stored with CRS and area computed

statement: The system shall record soil test results against plots
acceptance_criteria: Soil test linked to plot with date/parameters

statement: The system shall allow creation of crop plans and seasonal calendars
acceptance_criteria: Crop plan with crop season and activities saved

statement: The system shall record planting and field activity events
acceptance_criteria: Activity event with type date plot stored

statement: The system shall track input usage (seed fertiliser agrochemicals) per plot
acceptance_criteria: Input record with quantity/type/date; batch traceable

statement: The system shall capture pest and disease observations with optional images
acceptance_criteria: Observation stored; image classified when model available

statement: The system shall record spraying and chemical treatment applications
The system shall generate irrigation schedules from soil and weather inputs
acceptance_criteria: Schedule produced from inputs and displayed

statement: The system shall record harvest quantities and dates per plot
The system shall estimate yields from records and remote-sensing indices
The system shall track stored commodities quantities and storage conditions
The system shall issue and manage warehouse receipts
acceptance_criteria: Receipt issued with unique ID and status lifecycle

statement: The system shall support commodity listing and buyer-seller matching
acceptance_criteria: Listing created and matched trades recorded

statement: The system shall disseminate market price information to farmers
The system shall manage cooperative membership records
The system shall deliver extension advisory content to farmers
The system shall provide weather-based advisories per location
acceptance_criteria: Location advisory generated from weather source

statement: The system shall compute farmer credit scores from recorded data
The system shall record input-credit issuance and repayment
The system shall administer input subsidy/e-voucher redemption
The system shall disburse payments to farmers via mobile money
The system shall maintain livestock registry and identification
acceptance_criteria: Animal record with ID and attributes

statement: The system shall record livestock health and vaccination events
The system shall manage poultry batch cycles and records
The system shall record traceability/provenance data along produce chains
The system shall record training and attendance events
The system shall manage mechanisation/equipment bookings
acceptance_criteria: Booking created with schedule and status

statement: The system shall manage exploration and drillhole data
The system shall support geological and resource model data storage
The system shall record survey and geodetic control data
The system shall store mine plans and design artefacts
The system shall record production schedules and actuals
The system shall capture fleet dispatch and haulage records
The system shall ingest equipment telemetry for condition monitoring
The system shall manage maintenance work orders (CMMS)
The system shall maintain an asset register with lifecycle status
The system shall manage spares and consumables inventory
The system shall onboard and verify contractor compliance status
The system shall record and manage safety incidents
acceptance_criteria: Incident logged with severity and actions

statement: The system shall support safety inspections and audits
The system shall manage permit-to-work issuance
The system shall record environmental monitoring parameters
The system shall manage laboratory samples and results (LIMS)
The system shall submit statutory mining production and royalty reports
The system shall set up projects with work-breakdown structures
The system shall prepare bills of quantities and estimates
The system shall manage tenders and bids
The system shall produce construction schedules
The system shall capture site daily reports and progress
The system shall record quantity measurements and earthworks volumes
The system shall produce valuations and interim payment certificates
The system shall control cost and budget against plan
The system shall manage plant/equipment on site
The system shall manage workforce timesheets
The system shall conduct QA/QC inspections and snagging
The system shall manage HSE incidents and inductions
The system shall control documents drawings and RFIs
The system shall manage EIA screening and study records
The system shall track waste manifests and disposal
The system shall collect and report ESG metrics
The system shall compute carbon/GHG inventory from activity data
The system shall generate environmental compliance reports and track permits
acceptance_criteria: Compliance report and permit status produced

statement: The system shall record community grievances and engagement
The system shall create and manage transport orders
The system shall plan loads and trips
The system shall dispatch vehicles and loads
The system shall optimise delivery routes
The system shall manage fleet vehicles and telematics
The system shall capture proof of delivery
The system shall receive putaway and control warehouse inventory
The system shall manage picking packing and shipping
The system shall monitor cold-chain temperature conditions
acceptance_criteria: Temperature series stored with excursions flagged

statement: The system shall prepare cross-border and customs documentation
The system shall provide shipment transit tracking and visibility
The system shall maintain a general ledger and chart of accounts
The system shall manage accounts payable and receivable
The system shall process payments and disbursements
The system shall integrate mobile money for collections and payouts
The system shall compute and report statutory taxes
The system shall process payroll with statutory deductions
The system shall manage procurement and purchase orders
acceptance_criteria: PO lifecycle and vendor records tracked

statement: The system shall manage contracts and obligations
The system shall provide CRM contact and pipeline management
The system shall maintain HR employee records
The system shall manage leave and attendance
The system shall provide document management and retention
The system shall support electronic signatures on documents
The system shall provide BI dashboards and analytics
The system shall provide configurable report generation and distribution
The system shall support data import export and integration
The system shall send multichannel notifications (SMS email push USSD)
The system shall support workflow automation and approvals
The system shall maintain an immutable audit trail of actions
acceptance_criteria: All key actions logged with actor/time

statement: The system shall maintain a compliance and obligation register
The system shall authenticate users and entities
The system shall enforce role-based access control
The system shall support multi-factor authentication
acceptance_criteria: MFA challenge enforced for privileged access

statement: The system shall manage users organisations and tenants
The system shall capture data offline in the field
The system shall synchronise offline data when connectivity resumes
acceptance_criteria: Offline data syncs with conflict handling

statement: The system shall provide geospatial mapping and visualisation
acceptance_criteria: Map renders layers with basic query

statement: The system shall provide search across records
The system shall monitor KPIs and raise alerts on thresholds
The system shall manage consent and data-subject rights
The system shall support local languages in messaging and content
